channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Designer Maria Rcks shares conceptual AI interface that replaces standard model dropdowns with sliding inference selectors
item.description: The UI dynamically maps slider adjustments to hypothetical model configurations.
item.content:encoded:
The UI dynamically maps slider adjustments to hypothetical model configurations.

Original source: https://x.com/maria_rcks/status/2076176709221552447

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/e3ass606

  • Views: 181,434
  • Likes: 2,136
  • Bookmarks: 531
  • Replies: 63
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • jason
  • Theo - t3.gg
Maria is still under 6k followers, good opportunity to invest early

item.title: EU parliamentarians say leadership bypassed internal procedures to push through Chat Control chat-scanning regulation
item.description: German AI analyst Kim Isenberg called the maneuver an abuse of power.
item.content:encoded:
German AI analyst Kim Isenberg called the maneuver an abuse of power.

Original source: https://x.com/Fidias0/status/2076076703714037920

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/afuxrk0i

  • Views: 33,713
  • Likes: 418
  • Bookmarks: 64
  • Quotes: 6
  • Replies: 26
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • @levelsio
  • Chubby♨️
🇪🇺 Absolutely unacceptable 🤦

item.title: Lucas Beyer, AI researcher at Meta, uses a frontier LLM to quickly update model benchmark comparisons
item.description: The updated table accurately adds Z.ai's GLM-5.2 benchmark scores.
item.content:encoded:
The updated table accurately adds Z.ai's GLM-5.2 benchmark scores.

Original source: https://x.com/jasondeanlee/status/2076094729884971428

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/ncf89fqz

  • Views: 13,701
  • Likes: 64
  • Bookmarks: 8
  • Replies: 9
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Florian Brand
And yes i cross checked, looks correct.

item.title: Meta's Lucas Beyer flags suspicious duplicate X posts praising Google's product integration while criticising Google DeepMind's research
item.description: Commenters suspect a generative replybot underwent a mode collapse.
item.content:encoded:
Commenters suspect a generative replybot underwent a mode collapse.

Original source: https://x.com/Angaisb_/status/2076127198809936017

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/34o59vea

  • Views: 5,339
  • Likes: 26
  • Bookmarks: 3
  • Replies: 7
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Tanishq, Ph.D. at ICML
@giffmana The latter

item.title: Christian Szegedy, Math Inc. co-founder, warns against running autonomous AI agents outside virtualized environments
item.description: The warning follows a report that an agent deleted a user's files.
item.content:encoded:
The warning follows a report that an agent deleted a user's files.

Original source: https://x.com/mattshumer_/status/2075657271401390161

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/csiafg7a

  • Views: 2,794
  • Likes: 28
  • Bookmarks: 2
  • Replies: 4
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Christian Szegedy
  • Minh Nhat Nguyen
@ChrSzegedy or like, icloud is a thing

item.title: Over 100 UK tech founders and investors urge government policy changes to rebuild Britain's technology sector
item.description: Signatories include Air Street Capital founder Nathan Benaich.
item.content:encoded:
Signatories include Air Street Capital founder Nathan Benaich.

Original source: https://x.com/StartupCltn/status/2076217903871836325

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/xoe7sdvp

  • Views: 1,757
  • Likes: 8
  • Replies: 1
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Tim Rocktäschel
  • Nathan Benaich
Signed

item.title: OpenAI DX lead Vaibhav Srivastav reports bug causing entire X direct message history to disappear on mobile
item.description: A research engineer suggested migrating to MCP-supporting Beeper as an alternative.
item.content:encoded:
A research engineer suggested migrating to MCP-supporting Beeper as an alternative.

Original source: https://x.com/reach_vb/status/2076235611707486473/photo/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/l8iojz2s

  • Views: 6,577
  • Likes: 48
  • Bookmarks: 3
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Florian Brand
  • Vaibhav (VB) Srivastav
@reach_vb Just get on @beeper bro, it even has a MCP so you can tap into it with codex
